memoryArtifacts.headline: Rev. John Gorsuch, son of Daniel, p266 in "Baltimore County Families"
The Gorsuch Family p265 in "Baltimore County Families"
Sons of Rev. John Gorsuch, p266 in "Baltimore County Families"
Rev. John Gorsuch became Rector of Walkern (Walkhome) Parish (in Hertford Parish), Hertfordshire, England July 28, 1632.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Rev. John Gorsuch於1609年5月出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親Daniel Gorsuch41歲，母親Alice Hall34歲。他於1628年9月25日與Lady Anne Barnes Lovelace在英國英格蘭賀特福爾格亞特 維蒙德利結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1648年5月24日在英國賀特福爾瓦爾可享年39歲，埋葬在英國肯特武德內斯波洛聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rev. John Gorsuch于1609年5月出生在英国倫敦时，他的父亲Daniel Gorsuch41岁，母亲Alice Hall34岁。他于1628年9月25日与Lady Anne Barnes Lovelace在英国英格兰賀特福爾格亞特 維蒙德利结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1648年5月24日在英国賀特福爾瓦爾可享年39岁，埋葬在英国肯特武德內斯波洛聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Gorsuch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the hamlet of Gorsuch, Lancashire, earlier Gosefordsich, from Old English Gōsford ‘goose ford’ + sīc ‘small stream’.
History: This name is first recorded as that of a manor near Ormskirk held by Walter de Gosefordsich in the late 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Lawrence Pollard BIRTH	unknown DEATH	1631 Woodnesborough, Dover District, Kent, England BURIAL	 Saint Mary The Virgin Churchyard Woodnesborough, Dover District, Kent, England MEMORIAL ID	151035852

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Rev. John Gorsuch was born in May 1609, in London, England, his father, Daniel Gorsuch, was 41 and his mother, Alice Hall, was 34. He married Lady Anne Barnes Lovelace on 25 September 1628, in Great Wymondley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 24 May 1648, in Walkern, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rev. John Gorsuch est né en mai 1609, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, Daniel Gorsuch, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice Hall, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Barnes Lovelace le 25 septembre 1628, à Great Wymondley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 24 mai 1648, à Walkern, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rev. John Gorsuch im Mai 1609 in London, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Daniel Gorsuch 41 und seine Mutter Alice Hall 34. Er hat am 25. September 1628 in Great Wymondley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Anne Barnes Lovelace geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Mai 1648 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Walkern, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rev. John Gorsuch è nato il nel maggio 1609 nel London, England, il suo padre, Daniel Gorsuch, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Alice Hall, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne Barnes Lovelace il 25 settembre 1628, nel Great Wymondley, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 24 maggio 1648, nel Walkern, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Rev. John Gorsuchが1609年5月にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Daniel Gorsuchは41歳，母Alice Hallは34歳であった。1628年9月25日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアグレアト ウイモンドリーでLady Anne Barnes Lovelaceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1648年5月24日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウォーケルンで39歳で死去し，イギリスケントウッドネスボロウスト. マリー ス バージン チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesb: 영국 켄트 우드네스버루 스트. 메리 테 버긴 처르c히아어드
ko.St Edmund Acons, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 에드먼드 테 킨그 위스 스트 닉홀아스 악스
ko.lifeSummary: Rev. John Gorsuch(이)가 1609년 5월 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Daniel Gorsuch(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Hall(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1628년 9월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 그리트 윈이몽리에서 Lady Anne Barnes Lovelace(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1648년 5월 24일 영국 허트퍼드실르 워커에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 우드네스버루 스트. 메리 테 버긴 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rev. John Gorsuch nasceu em maio de 1609, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Daniel Gorsuch, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Alice Hall, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne Barnes Lovelace em 25 de setembro de 1628, em Great Wymondley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de maio de 1648, em Walkern, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.St Edmund Acons, London, England: ст эдмунд т кинг вит ст ничолас акунс, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rev. John Gorsuch родился май 1609 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени Daniel Gorsuch было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Hall, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Barnes Lovelace 25 сентября 1628 г. в местности грит вимондли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 24 мая 1648 г. в местности валкирн, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности ст. мэри т виргин чурчярд, вуднесбороую, кэнт, Англия.

es.St Edmund Acons, London, England: St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rev. John Gorsuch nació en mayo de 1609, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, Daniel Gorsuch, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Alice Hall, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Lady Anne Barnes Lovelace el 25 de septiembre de 1628, en Great Wymondley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 24 de mayo de 1648, en Walkern, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inglaterra.
